flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Detroit Mercy fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Detroit Mercy are 31% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($71.0k vs $54.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Detroit Mercy rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 (26.5% → 31.2%).
